review_title: Easy Website Builder for Small Businesses
description: Overall, my experience with Zarla has been very positive. The platform is beginner-friendly, efficient, and designed for business owners who want a professional website without dealing with complicated technical steps. I would definitely recommend it to anyone who wants a simple and reliable way to get online.
author: Gabriel P.
pros: What I liked most about Zarla was how simple and fast everything was to set up. The platform walks you through each step clearly, even if you have no technical background. It made building a professional-looking website feel stress-free and straightforward.
cons: The only thing I found confusing at first was the domain setup process. I initially thought my website already included a domain, so being asked whether I wanted one or already had one caused some confusion. Once it was explained, it made sense, but clearer guidance upfront would help.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: No customer service at all!!! terrible
description: Horrible, absolutely no customer service! No one answers at all. I'm trying to contact them for a week now and nothing!
author: Svetlana M.
pros: Built a website fast. Editing was easy and AI gave a description just the way I wanted. My friends liked look of it.
cons: I can't connect it to my GoDaddy domain, so I wasted my time building it! I tried to contact them through emails 2 addresses and the messenger. No one answered for a week now.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
